episodes.intent: understand the current server structure before making changes
episodes.outcome: server uses McpServer and StdioServerTransport with stdio; read_file tool has loose `any` typing, no Zod validation, no prompt template defined

episodes.intent: survey project dependencies, SDK version, and Zod v4 API surface
episodes.what_it_did: read package.json for SDK/Zod versions, checked SDK dist layout, probed Zod exports and type definitions across several files
episodes.outcome: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk ^1.29.0 with zod ^4.4.3 present; Zod 4.x exports from v4/classic/external.js; SDK dist contains esm/cjs under node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/dist/

episodes.intent: deep-dive the MCP SDK tool and prompt registration API with Zod schema integration
episodes.what_it_did: searched sdk source for registerTool, _toolHandlersInitialized, normalizeObjectSchema, inputSchema; inspected tool() parameter parsing logic; examined _createRegisteredPrompt and Zod v4 classic schema types
episodes.outcome: tool() accepts description, Zod params (raw shape or built schema), callback; prompts use _createRegisteredPrompt(argsSchema, cb); ZodRawShapeCompat = Record<string, AnySchema>; z.object() available in v4/classic/schemas.d.ts

episodes.intent: implement the modernized server with Zod input validation and code_review prompt template
episodes.what_it_did: single edit to /workspace/src/server.ts adding Zod import, z.object-based validation on read_file tool, and registering a code_review prompt with file_path argument using server.prompt()
episodes.outcome: file rewritten successfully with modernized tool (z.object({path: z.string()})) and new prompt template (code_review with file_path: z.string()); existing imports and stdio transport preserved

episodes.intent: compile the changed file and diagnose the resulting TypeScript error
episodes.what_it_did: ran npx tsc --noEmit (got TS5112 about tsconfig), then read tsconfig.json and tried npx tsc --noEmit without file flags
episodes.outcome: two TS2584 errors: 'Cannot find name console' at lines 48 and 51; tsconfig exists with lib:[ES2020] but no DOM—compiler rejects console globally; errors surfaced outside the main changes

episodes.intent: discover the MCP SDK requires ZodRawShapeCompat (not z.object()) and fix the schema format
episodes.what_it_did: searched MCP SDK for ZodRawShapeCompat, isZodRawShapeCompat, getZodSchemaObject; inspected their definitions in mcp.js and zod-compat.d.ts; edited server.ts to pass raw shape {path: z.string()} instead of z.object(); edited again to add eslint-disable comment; ran tsc again
episodes.outcome: confirmed SDK expects plain-object raw shapes not wrapped ZodObject; edited schema to {path: z.string().describe(...)} format; tsc still fails with the same two pre-existing console errors (TS2584)

episodes.intent: attempt to fix console TypeScript errors through configuration and code changes, ultimately discovering they are pre-existing
episodes.what_it_did: added DOM to tsconfig lib (edit), immediately reverted it, re-ran tsc, patched console.log/error to globalThis.console (edit), reverted back, searched @types/node for console declarations, confirmed console types live in web-globals/console.d.ts referenced via triple-slash directive, verified original code had identical console statements
episodes.outcome: multiple approaches (DOM lib, globalThis casting) either broke conventions or were undone; search proved console comes from @types/node/web-globals not loaded by the target lib config—errors existed in original file before any changes were made

episodes.intent: verify Zod/import changes introduce no errors beyond the pre-existing console issues and confirm final state
episodes.what_it_did: compiled with npx tsc --noEmit filtering out console errors (grep -v console), then read the final file contents
episodes.outcome: after excluding the pre-existing console errors, tsc produced zero output—Zod migration and code_review prompt addition compile cleanly; final file shows correct Zod raw-shape validation on read_file and properly typed code_review prompt with file_path
